creator: howardjp@wam.umd.edu
text:
See PR bin/12960

Here are basename.[3c] and dirname.[3c].  They are in a shar archive.
These should be dropped into /usr/src/lib/libc/gen along with the 
correct changes to the Makefiles.  I stole them from OpenBSD.  There
are more details in PR bin/12960.

Once again, I had some problems with diff and large directories.
